impact: Advances the PP&D guardrail plan by adding deterministic sign permit workflow coverage without live crawl, DevHub automation, private data, uploads, submissions, payments, or authenticated artifacts.
summary: Add fixture-only sign permit guardrail tests covering missing facts, document groups, payment, corrections, inspections, and finalization stop points.
target_task: Task checkbox-100: Add guardrail compiler fixture tests for the sign permit workflow covering missing facts, required document groups, payment stop points, correction-upload stop points, and any inspection/finalization stop points, using only fixture data.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
